calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Award Of Post Judgment Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion For Award Of Post Judgment Attorney's Fees Pursuant to Civil Code Section 1717, and Code Of Civil Procedure Sections 1033.5 and 685.040 is granted in the amount of $2,550. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditor's Trade Asociation, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Feb-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery and For Monetary Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The proofs of service show that the discovery and the motion were not served on the party.
COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Noticed Turnover Order In Aid Of Execution
Off Calendar Mar-03-2005 Granted Per Written Order

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
